tables.name: member
tables.description: Student club members with personal info, major, and role. Contains 33 members.

columns.name: email
columns.description: University email address of the member. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'vincent.ratcliffe@lpu.edu', 'kevin.pierce@lpu.edu'.

columns.name: first_name
columns.description: First name of the member. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Vincent', 'Kevin', 'Connor', 'Adela'.

columns.name: last_name
columns.description: Last name of the member. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Ratcliffe', 'Pierce', 'Hilton', 'O'Gallagher'.

columns.name: major_department
columns.description: Academic department of the member's major. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Human Development and Family Studies Department', 'Civil and Environmental Engineering Department'.

columns.name: major_name
columns.description: Name of the member's major/program. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Human Development and Family Studies', 'Civil Engineering', 'Nutrition Science', 'Portuguese'.

columns.name: member_city
columns.description: City where the member resides. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Hartselle', 'Apple Valley', 'Grosse Pointe', 'Cary'.

columns.name: member_state
columns.description: US state where the member resides. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Alabama', 'California', 'Michigan', 'Indiana', 'North Carolina'.

columns.name: phone
columns.description: Phone number of the member. Type: TEXT. Examples: '894-555-4529', '933-555-4147'.

columns.name: position
columns.description: Role or position within the club. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Member', 'Inactive', 'President', 'Vice President', 'Secretary', 'Treasurer'.

columns.name: t_shirt_size
columns.description: T-shirt size of the member. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Small', 'Medium', 'Large', 'X-Large'.

tables.name: major
tables.description: Academic majors with college and department affiliations. Contains 113 majors.

columns.name: college
columns.description: College within the university that the major belongs to. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'College of Humanities and Social Sciences', 'School of Business', 'College of Natural Resources', 'College of Engineering'.

columns.name: department
columns.description: Department within the college. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Political Science Department', 'Economics and Finance Department', 'Watershed Sciences Department'.

columns.name: major_name
columns.description: Name of the academic major. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Political Science', 'International Studies', 'Economics', 'Computer Engineering'.

tables.name: zip_code
tables.description: US ZIP code directory with city, county, and state information. Contains 500 records.

columns.name: city
columns.description: City associated with the ZIP code. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Harwich Port', 'Whately', 'Boston', 'Lynn', 'Ponce'.

columns.name: county
columns.description: County associated with the ZIP code. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Barnstable County', 'Franklin County', 'Suffolk County', 'Essex County'.

columns.name: short_state
columns.description: Two-letter state abbreviation. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'MA', 'PR'.

columns.name: state
columns.description: Full state name. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Massachusetts', 'Puerto Rico'.

columns.name: type
columns.description: Type of ZIP code. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Standard', 'PO Box', 'Unique'.

tables.name: event
tables.description: Club events including meetings, games, and community service activities. Contains 42 events.

columns.name: event_date
columns.description: Date and time of the event. Type: TEXT (ISO 8601 format). Examples: '2020-03-10T12:00:00', '2019-10-10T06:00:00'.

columns.name: event_name
columns.description: Name of the event. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Lacrosse game', 'April Meeting', 'January Meeting', 'Habitat for Humanity'.

columns.name: location
columns.description: Venue or location where the event takes place. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Campus Soccer/Lacrosse stadium', 'MU 215', '258 S. Maple St.'.

columns.name: notes
columns.description: Additional notes or description about the event. Type: TEXT. May be empty. Examples: 'Attend school teams Lacrosse game as a group.', 'Volunteer opportunity to help paint new home.'.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Current status of the event. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Open', 'Closed', 'Planning'.

columns.name: type
columns.description: Category of the event. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Meeting', 'Game', 'Community Service', 'Speaker', 'Social'.

tables.name: attendance
tables.description: Records of member attendance at club events. Contains 326 records.

columns.name: event_date
columns.description: Date and time of the attended event. Type: TEXT (ISO 8601). Examples: '2019-10-10T06:00:00'.

columns.name: event_name
columns.description: Name of the attended event. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Football game', 'Community Theater', 'Officers meeting - April'.

columns.name: member_first_name
columns.description: First name of the attending member. Type: TEXT.

columns.name: member_last_name
columns.description: Last name of the attending member. Type: TEXT.

tables.name: budget
tables.description: Budget allocations for club events by category. Contains 52 records.

columns.name: amount
columns.description: Budgeted amount in dollars. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '150', '75', '20'.

columns.name: category
columns.description: Budget category. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Food', 'Advertisement', 'Club T-Shirts', 'Parking', 'Speaker Gifts'.

columns.name: event_date
columns.description: Date and time of the event this budget is for. Type: TEXT (ISO 8601).

columns.name: event_name
columns.description: Name of the event this budget is allocated for. Type: TEXT.

columns.name: event_status
columns.description: Status of the associated event. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Open', 'Closed', 'Planning'.

columns.name: remaining
columns.description: Remaining budget amount (budget minus spent). Can be negative if overspent. Type: TEXT (decimal string). Examples: '-24.25', '75.0', '48.06'.

columns.name: spent
columns.description: Amount already spent from this budget. Type: TEXT (decimal string). Examples: '174.25', '0.0', '101.94'.

tables.name: expense
tables.description: Individual expense records submitted by club members. Contains 32 records.

columns.name: approved
columns.description: Whether the expense has been approved. Type: TEXT. Values: 'true' (approved) or empty (pending). Examples: 'true', ''.

columns.name: budget_category
columns.description: Budget category this expense falls under. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Food', 'Advertisement', 'Club T-Shirts', 'Parking', 'Speaker Gifts'.

columns.name: cost
columns.description: Cost of the expense in dollars. Type: TEXT (decimal string). Examples: '54.25', '51.81', '295.12'.

columns.name: expense_date
columns.description: Date the expense was incurred. Type: TEXT (YYYY-MM-DD). Examples: '2019-09-01', '2019-10-08'.

columns.name: expense_description
columns.description: Description of what was purchased. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Posters', 'Pizza', 'Water, chips, cookies', 'Club shirts'.

columns.name: member_first_name
columns.description: First name of the member who submitted the expense. Type: TEXT.

columns.name: member_last_name
columns.description: Last name of the member who submitted the expense. Type: TEXT.

tables.name: income
tables.description: Income records for the club from dues and other sources. Contains 36 records.

columns.name: amount
columns.description: Income amount in dollars. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '50'.

columns.name: date_received
columns.description: Date the income was received. Type: TEXT (YYYY-MM-DD). Examples: '2019-09-09', '2019-10-02'.

columns.name: member_first_name
columns.description: First name of the member who paid. Type: TEXT.

columns.name: member_last_name
columns.description: Last name of the member who paid. Type: TEXT.

columns.name: notes
columns.description: Additional notes about the income. Type: TEXT. Usually empty.

columns.name: source
columns.description: Source of the income. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Dues', 'Fundraising', 'Donation'.
